title: Olrla 60CM Long Artificial Lily 4PCS, toal 8 Blooming Flower Heads 4 Buds, 3D Print Fake Tiger Lily Flowers for Wedding Home Hotel Office Decoration (NO VASE)
features: Each flower designed to the high standard 3D Print with great detail to each petals with gradient nature look. The whole bouquets have 8 heads 4 buds, which in vase looks full and vibrant.
Each Stem has 4 leaves,2 blooming flower and 1 buds, diameter of flower approx: 15cm. total length approx: 60cm, perfect for tall vase on the table as centerpieces.WITHOUT VASE
The long lily stem is easy to be trimed or freely bend as your DIY need, it can be mixed with other kind flower for beautiful flora arrangement.

Our artificial lilies are nice choice for any purpose or occasion whether at home as a center piece decoration or in the office, shops, restaurants, also important elements in wedding,party, events,even well gifting on mothers Day,Christmas Day,Valentine Day,Thanksgiving Day,New Year
Artificial flowers are never withering for long-term home decor without season limit, maintaince-free, good choice for people who like Lily but has no time to dealing with fresh flowers.
description: Product Description 60cm Long Stem Artificial Lily Flower Specification Material : Latex plastic, metal wire inside for easy stem adjustment Package: 8 blooming flowers and 4 flower buds in one package, you can buy more to get full bouquet Widely Application: can be DIY for table centerpieces, for wedding bouquets, for flora arragement, for gift to loved ones.
